name: Symbl.ai Conversation Intelligence API
what_it_does: Symbl.ai REST and WebSocket APIs for conversation intelligence and real-time speech analytics. Enables AI agents to transcribe audio/video conversations, extract action items, topics, sentiment, and questions in real-time or from recordings, and integrate conversation insights into meeting and customer interaction workflows. Symbl.ai specializes in contextual understanding of spoken conversations.
use_cases: Transcribing and analyzing meeting recordings from conversation intelligence agents
Extracting action items and follow-ups from real-time call analysis agents
Monitoring sentiment and topics in customer calls from CX analytics agents
Building conversation-aware applications with real-time speech understanding agents
not_for: Simple audio transcription without semantic understanding needs
Video hosting or streaming without analysis requirements
Consumer personal dictation without conversation context
best_when: A sales, customer success, or meeting productivity team wants AI agents to extract structured insights (action items, sentiment, topics) from spoken conversations in real-time or from recordings.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+CONSENT: Transcribing and analyzing conversations requires explicit participant consent. Recording without consent may violate wiretapping laws in many jurisdictions.

auth.notes: Symbl.ai uses app ID + app secret to generate access tokens via OAuth 2.0 client credentials. Tokens expire after 24 hours. All API calls require Bearer token.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-as-you-go per minute processed; enterprise volume pricing available
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for developers. Pay-per-minute model scales with usage.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per app; higher limits on paid plans

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY+CONSENT: Conversation recording and analysis requires explicit participant consent
No public MCP server — REST + WebSocket API
Real-time analysis uses WebSocket streaming — different protocol than async REST
Access tokens expire in 24 hours — implement token refresh for long-running agents
Async processing requires polling or webhooks for job completion
US data residency only — may not meet EU data localization requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Conversation content is highly sensitive personal data. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2 token auth. US data residency only — verify for international deployments.

security_score_components.security_notes: Conversation intelligence with highly sensitive audio/text content. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US-only data residency.
